_comment: Delve (and Trovehunter's Bounty) loot pools are server-side only — they exist in no client database, so this file is curated by hand. Add entries as {"id": 12345} or {"name": "Exact Item Name"}; names are resolved against the game's item database on the next 'Refresh data'. The Delves source appears in the droptimizer once this list is non-empty.
